properties.remark: ROTATING CLOUD TORNADO LIKE REPORTED FROM AIRCRAFT PILOT AT 347PM PDT. BROADCAST MEDIA LATER CONFIRMED TORNADO WITH PHOTOS. RADAR ANALYSIS DETERMINED THAT THUNDERSTORM IN AREA AT THE TIME COULD HAVE PRODUCED A TORNADO... HOWEVER NO SAMPLING AT LOWER LEVELS AVAILABLE.
REVISED REPORT... A LANDSPOUT TORNADO WAS REPORTED BY THE PUBLIC. NWS REMOTE SURVEY INDICATES THIS TORNADO HAD A STRENGTH OF EF0.
